mv.t:
市面价值, 平均变化, 中压, 商船, 内燃机船, 初速
[计] 毫伏
mv.d:
n a unit of potential equal to one thousandth of a volt
n a radioactive transuranic element synthesized by bombarding einsteinium with alpha particles (Md is the current symbol for mendelevium but Mv was formerly the symbol)

mvc.t: abbr. 手动音量调节（Manual Volume Control）；多元计算器（Multiple Variate Counter）

mvd.t: abbr. 地图的视觉显示（Map and Visual Display）；揿动速度测定（Migration Velocity Determination）；发动机电压降（Motor Voltage Drop）；俄国内务部（Ministeyrstvo Vnutreynnikh Deyl）

mveloid tissue.t: [医] 骨髓组织, 红骨髓

mveng.t: [地名] [赤道几内亚、喀麦隆] 姆翁

mvic.t: [医][=maximum voluntary isometric contraction]最大随意等长收缩

mvma.t: abbr. million vehicle miles 百万车辆英里; Motor Vehicle Manufacturers Association 机动车厂商协会

mvp.t: abbr. （美）最优秀选手（most valuable player）
mvp.d: n the player judged to be the most important to the sport

mvps.t: [医][=mitral valve prolapse syndrome]二尖瓣脱垂综合征

mvs.d:
n a unit of potential equal to one thousandth of a volt
n a radioactive transuranic element synthesized by bombarding einsteinium with alpha particles (Md is the current symbol for mendelevium but Mv was formerly the symbol)

mvt.t: [计] 任务数可变的多道操作系统

mvv.t: abbr. maximum vacation value 最大假期价值; maximum voluntary ventilation 最大随意通风
